title: Manufacturing Engineer - Bharat Petroleum - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Bharat Petroleum - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Bharat Petroleum is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Indore. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Bharat Petroleum:
Bharat Petroleum is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bharat Petroleum!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
